sourcesContent:
<template>
    
</template>

<script>

import 'primeicons/primeicons.css';
import apiService from '@/service/apiService';
import { Column, DataTable, Button } from 'primevue';
import { ref } from 'vue';

export default {
    components: {
        DataTable, Column, Button
    },
    data() {
        return {
            selectedLotes: ref(),
            metaKey: ref(true),
            lotes: ref([])
        }
    },
    methods: {
        async getLotes() {
            try {
                const response = await apiService.getLotes();
                this.lotes = response.data;
            } catch (error) {
                console.error("Failed to fetch Lotes:", error);
            }
        }
    },
    mounted() {
        this.getLotes();
    }


}
</script>

<style></style>
